title: 14 Oak Lane — full valuation
transcript_text:
Sarah Mitchell: Mrs Hartley, walking through 14 Oak Lane SW19 3PQ again for the detailed notes.

Mrs Patricia Hartley: Please go ahead.

Sarah Mitchell: Property condition is very good — roof replaced two years ago, boiler serviced annually.

Mrs Patricia Hartley: Main motivation is relocating to Manchester for my husband's new role.

Mrs Patricia Hartley: We're hoping for around £650,000 — firm on that unless the market shifts dramatically.

Sarah Mitchell: Timeline to list?

Mrs Patricia Hartley: Before September, ideally August.

Mrs Patricia Hartley: Ensuite bathroom needs updating, estimate £8,000. Garden decking should be replaced before photos — optional but recommended.

Mrs Patricia Hartley: Concerned about stamp duty changes and whether buyers will wait for rate stability.

Sarah Mitchell: Follow-up: send SW19 comparables by Friday, book second viewing for Mrs Hartley's sister, and arrange EPC check.
summary_text: Detailed 14 Oak Lane valuation: excellent condition, Manchester relocation, firm £650k, list before September, ensuite £8k + decking, stamp duty concerns, three follow-ups.
